---
title: Accordion
subtitle: A quarto shortcode extension to add Bootstrap accordion component
accordion:
  - ac:
    - header: Item 1
      body: This is the body content for item 1
    - header: Item 2
      body: This is the body content for item 2
      collapsed: false
    - header: Item 3
      body: This is the body content for item 3
    - header: Item 4
      body: This is the body content for item 4
format:
  html:
    title-block-banner: true
    theme: pulse
---

A quarto shortcode extension to add [Bootstrap accordion component](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.1/components/accordion/) for **html** and **revealjs** formats. Minimal non-interactive fallbacks are provided for other output formats **pdf** and **typst**.

{{< accordion ac >}}

## Install

- Requires Quarto >= 1.4.0
- In the root of the quarto project, run in terminal:

  ```
  quarto add royfrancis/quarto-accordion
  ```

This will install the extension under the `_extensions` subdirectory. See 'usage' document for details on how to use the shortcode.
